source_anchor: Friedrich Nietzsche, Also sprach Zarathustra, Zarathustra's Vorrede 1, route-local analogy surface grounded through tos.source.thus-spoke-zarathustra.prologue and first anchored at seg.1.1.1.5 (1,1,1,5)
distilled_thesis: The bee-and-honey analogy gives imagistic form to accumulated wisdom, keeping the route's scene of overfull sweetness explicit without turning the image into independent doctrine.
